properties.entry: Do you want to stop writing?
Do you want to delete the department?

Among the user's personal approval paths below, the approval path containing the user's department will be deleted.
Do you want to proceed anyway?
Failed to delete the department / approval path.

If a department is deleted, all "collaboration" and internal data based on the department structure will also be deleted and cannot be recovered.
Are you sure you want to delete this department?
Select the upper department of the department you want to create to form an organization.
Enter the name of the department you want to create.
Enter the explanation of the department.

The red department icon is a virtual department and can be used for adding users before assigning a department. (Virtual departments cannot be deleted and sub departments cannot be added to the virtual department.)
The department can be renamed to "virtual department/temporary department" or set to not be exposed on the user screen.
Attendance admin of the department can register clock in/out information of the department’s member and can check attendance state of the department’s member.
The leader of the department basically has the authority of the attendance admin, additionally can designate the member as the attendance admin.
Designate Approver of mail sending to external
The leader of the department can designate the approver of mail sending to external, approver can approve mail sending to external in [Sending to external] > [Awaiting Approval]
How to set Sending to external : Admin Setting > Service Setting > Mail > Sending to external
Department's approver of mail sending to external
Please agree to the use of the service.
The skin is set. The screen will be refreshed.
Failed to upload the Excel file.
Enter your basic information, duty and responsibility directly.
※ It is applied to the Organization chart immediately when you click the [Save] button.
* It is used as a means for identification, so please enter it correctly.
This is a function that allows users to easily use other services (website, cloud service, etc.) frequently used within the groupware.
You can connect through the current U+ Web fax service / previous Groupware customer account.
- By linking with WebFax site, you can use the LG U+ WebFax service quickly and easily without a separate login process.
- WebFax service allows you to send and receive fax through the Internet without the fax machine.
- If you set U+ WebFax in this screen, after signing up for U+ WebFax service, you can use it in [Support] > [FAX] menu
- Enter the ID@groupware address/password used in the previous groupware service
The e-mail address and password entered will be kept during the period of use of the service.
Only one account can be linked to the notification. (Even if you own multiple accounts, only one account can be connected.)
This function allows you to receive notifications from the Groupware Messenger when a mail reception event occurs in your Google Mail.
This function allows you to receive notifications from the Groupware Messenger when a file change event occurs in your Google Drive.
This function allows you to receive notifications from the Groupware Messenger when events such as registration or invitation occurs in your Google Calendar.
Due to changes in Google API policy, new Google Connection is not possible for the time being.
Even if you already Used it, it is difficult to link again after canceling, so please consider carefully when canceling.

Due to changes in Google API policy,
new Google Connection is not possible for the time being.
* You can set up Google Mail linkage in Service Settings> Mail
Messenger connection server information of the company.
If you are connecting other messenger, you can enter the information and use it.
Set whether to receive notifications in real-time when new e-mails, messages, payment requests, etc. are arrived.
First, after setting ‘Use’ in [Real-time Notification], detailed notification method and target for each menu can be set in [Service Setting].
If you set ‘Not’ in [Real-time Notification], you cannot receive the real-time notification even if you set notification for each menu in [Service Setting].
It is activated after setting ‘Use’ in [Real-time Notification]
Set whether to receive real-time notifications through the browser.
After setting ‘Use’ In [Web Notifications, you can set detailed notification methods and targets for each menu in the [Service Setting].
If you set ‘Not’ in [Web Notification], you cannot receive the web notification even if you set notification for each menu in [Service Setting]
It is a function to change the color of the Groupware, and you can select one of four colors.
※ The color is applied immediately when you click the [Save] button
In each Groupware Menu, Set the number of items that appear on 1 page.
(Mail / Note / Approval / Board / Business / Calendar / Attendance / Address)
Register or change the department of the selected user.
If the selected user belongs to multiple departments, please select the department at the top and check the representative department.
You can designate the user as the Charge of receipt / Attendance Admin / Document box Admin.
Modify department / authority of the user
Make sure to create a Password by mixing 3 out of 4 English (large), English (small), numbers, and special characters.
3 or more times of the same character, 3 or more consecutive characters (123 or 321, abc, cba, etc.), and 3 or more characters identical to the ID cannot be used.
Enter the name of the user's department.
If the user's birth day is entered, the employee's birthday information is displayed in the calendar menu.
The registered picture is displayed in the profile area of ​​the groupware web screen and in the messenger.
After creating a user account, enter an external email address (Naver, Daum, Google, etc.) to deliver the creation result.
When you register an employee in "Human Resources> Employee Information> Employee Registration tab", you must enter the employee identification number to get Groupware user Information.
* Only English small letters, numbers, and periods are allowed.
* Enter only when changing the password (the previous password cannot be used).
* Download the sample form file, fill out the form according to the form, and upload it. If the form is different, you cannot register.
* Please divide uploads by 20 people at a time.
[Cautions when filling out the sample form]
1) the columns marked with (*) are required, so Enter them.
2) the first row is recognized as the first row of each column in Excel. Enter actual attendance data from the second row.
3) Work code: Enter A for addition, U for correction, and D for deletion.

4) Password: It is required only when adding and is initially set as the value entered in Excel. When modifying, the Password is not changed. Please use the individual user edit menu to change the Password.
Even if the Excel file is modified, the password does not change, and the user password can be changed in User Settings / Administrator Settings.
Make sure to create a Password by mixing 3 out of 4 English (large), English (small), numbers, and special characters.
3 or more times of the same character, 3 or more consecutive characters (123 or 321, abc, cba, etc.), and 3 or more characters identical to the ID cannot be used.
5) Paid/Free Category: Y Free User / N Paid User (Enter Y only when using messenger only.)
6) Employee Type: I internal employees / e external cooperative employees

7) Employee identification number: When you register an employee in "Human Resources> Employee Information> Employee Registration tab", you must enter the employee identification number to get Groupware user Information.
Departments and users of the organization chart can be exported to an Excel file.
* If you click the department/Administrator, it will be added to the Approval Path.
Double-check your Password to keep your personal Information safe.
Always be careful not to expose your Password to others.
Please be careful not to expose your groupware account and password to others, and change them frequently.
If the account and password are exposed, it may cause a problem in which a large amount of spam emails and texts are sent by using the user's account.
Mix 3 Types of English (capital), English (small), numbers, and special characters. (8-20 characters)
- If you set U+ WebFax in this screen, after signing up for U+ WebFax service, you can use it in [Support] > [FAX] menu
Select the language of the Groupware.
※ It will be applied from the next Login.
Set the time zone of the Groupware.
※ It is applied immediately when you click the [Save] button.
When you register an employee in "Human Resources> Employee Information> Employee Registration tab", you must enter the employee identification number to get Groupware user Information.
*Only letters, numbers, and hyphens (-) are allowed.
Customers who are already in use cannot be re-enabled
if this is changed to Disabled.
Do you want to change to disabled?
8) Agency : If the user is a messenger user(Y) and the employee type is an external partner employee(e), please enter the agency.
When you set "Not", your PC messenger is logged in, you will not receive a mobile push.
9) 아이디가 존재하지 않는 경우, 해당 행은 엑셀 업로드를 진행하지 않습니다.
Failed to register the calendar push notification.
Failed to release the existing drive push notification.
Failed to release the driving push notification.
Failed to release the existing mail push notification.
Failed to register the mail push notification.
[U+ Works] You are registered as a new user.
U+ Works e-mail address change authentication
Copy the address book of a specific user to another user.
Select the owner of the address book to be transferred.
Select the address book to be transferred.
Click [Organization Chart] and select the recipient to be transferred
After selecting the recipient, click the [Copy] button.
Select the owner of the address book to be transferred.
The target and the acquirer cannot be the same
The position name can be entered up to 20 characters.
The position explanation can be entered up to 255 characters.
The position name cannot contain special characters (", ', ')
Do you want to delete the position?
In use position cannot be deleted.
The job title can be entered up to 20 characters.
The job title explanation can be entered up to 255 characters.
The job title name cannot contain special characters (", ', ')
Do you want to delete the job title?
In use job title cannot be deleted.
Please complete the requested absence approval.

The maximum size of 1 attach capacity
cannot exceed 100MB per service.
The WebDisk can be up to 1000MB.

If you approve the invited user
, the organization chart will be shown to that user.
Do you want to approve it?

Do you want to return the invited user?
If returned, the selected invited user will be deleted.
Set the user to designate {0} authority.
*You can adjust the order by dragging and dropping.
When a company uses multiple mail domains, set the sending mail domain for each user.
If you select Setting, you can designate users for each domain.
If you click the [Add] button, the Designate user for each domain screen appears.
Enter the classifiacation name, select the domain, select the user to use the domain in the organization chart, and save it.
Groups by registered domain are displayed, and you can check the designated users.
Users can be registered in multiple domains at the same time.
Tip for use : In the case of a company composed of affiliates, register the upper department name as the affiliate name, and then register the mail domain for each department.
*This is a function to set the sending mail domain for each user when using multiple mail domains in the company.
It is activated by clicking the [Add] button or clicking a specific address in the access address list.
You can set the access URL to access the Groupware.
Enter the Groupware URL registered in DNS, and select whether to use the default access address for the access URL to be used as the default when there are multiple URLs.
You can check the registered Groupware access URL.
You can modify by clicking the specific access URL.
It is recommended to change the Groupware user password periodically.
If a user password is leaked, there may be damage such as sending a large amount of spam emails to the user ID
It is recommended to use it to strengthen the security of using Groupware.
When the user login, an SMS authentication code is sent to the user, and the user can log in by entering the sent authentication code..
SMS authentication is only available to customers who have subscribed to the SMS additional service.

* If the mobile phone number is not registered, the authentication process is not performed and access is restricted.
* SMS authentication can be used only when the mobile phone numbers of all personnel in the organization chart are registered.
Company Document box View Authority Setting
A user with the Company Document box view Authority can view the Company Document box in the Approval service m
In the Company Document box, all approval documents of the company can be viewed, so the company document authority must be designated only to those who need this authority.
Tip for use : In the case of a company composed of affiliates, register the upper department name as the affiliate name and designate the view authority for each affiliate.
Company Document box View Authority Setting
Invite as a user of U+ Groupware Messenger for real-time communication withexternal cooperative employees.
Enter the email address of the person you want to invite.
* Messenger users can view the organization chart of the company.
* If there are multiple people to invite, after the e-mail address, separate them with (comma)
Manages the users invited as messenger users for real-time communication with external cooperative employees. (The Invite messenger user menu is located at the bottom right of the main screen.)
You can approve and return the invited user.
Select Invited User : Determine whether to approve the user through the approve or return buttons.
You can strengthen the security level of Groupware by registering a specific IP that can use the Groupware service and restricting access to the Groupware only from registered IP.
You can register specific IP or IP band to allow Groupware access.

You can designate and delete users who are allowed to access Groupware through the organization chart and search within the ‘Allowed User’ pop-up window that opens by clicking the [Organization Chart] button.
This is a function that allows Groupware access to salespeople or Groupware managers who need access from outside the company. (Even if IP is not the Company IP address.)
LG Uplus, Dacom, Powercom, integrated service, terminal, membership, customer center, etc.
You can add / check / modify the shortcut link information displayed at the bottom right of the Groupware screen.
If you click the subject of a specific link, the [Delete] / [Modify] / [Up] / [Down] buttons are opened to the right of the [Add] button.
Add: If you click the button, the “Register Link” pop-up window opens, and you can save by entering a name / access address / explanation.
Modify: You can modify the name / access address / explanation of the selected through “Register Link” pop-up by clicking [Modify] button
Up: Moves the selected link to the top of the item.
Down: Moves the selected link down of the item.

Set the menu to be used in the company.
Disabled menus are not displayed in PC version, mobile version, and messenger and cannot be used.
Select the menu to be used from the all Groupware menu list.
After changing the settings, clicking the [Save] button, and refreshing, the set menu is applied.
Set how to download attached files.
Direct download : Users can download attached files directly to your phone from the mobile app. (Android)
Use viewer : Attached files from the mobile app are not downloaded to the mobile phone and are displayed on the screen as a viewer.
You can set whether to allow login with the mobile app.
Only Allowed user : Only allowed users can log in to the mobile app.
All user : All users can log in to the mobile app.
Please note that if you click the [Reset] button, all the set user lists will be deleted.
This function is used when you want to deliver important notice through a pop-up window.
Subject: Enter the subject of the pop-up directly.
Period: Specify the period to display the pop-up window.
Pop-up option: Specify the size and location of the pop-up window.
(Ex : width 200px, height 300px, top coordinates 0px left coordinates 0px)
You can check the list of created pop-up notices.
Add Pop-up : You can register a new pop-up through the 'Pop-up setting' screen that opens by clicking [Add Pop-up].
Modify Pop-up : You can modify an existing pop-up through the 'Pop-up setting' screen that opens by clicking the subject of the existing pop-up.
Delete Pop-up : When the check box of the pop-up item is checked, the [Delete] button is opened to the right of the [Add Pop-up] button, and specific pop-up can be deleted through the button.
This function is used when you want to deliver important notice through a pop-up window.
Subject: Enter the subject of the pop-up directly.
Period: Specify the period to display the pop-up window.
Pop-up size: The size of the pop-up window can be set horizontally or vertically.
Pop-up use: When set to not use, pop-up is not displayed even during the pop-up period.
Pop-up option: You can specify the size of the pop-up window, and if not specified, the pop-up window is displayed with the default size. (ex : width 200px height 300px)
Pop-up location: You can specify the location to display the pop-up window.
Administrator authorigy can be individually designated according to job responsibilities.
Select the user to designate administrator authority.
You can designate and revoke administrator privileges to individual users.
The administrator can set and manage the service menu and basic settings on the admin setting page (except Approval and Attendance).
Select the user to designate company administrator authority.
Select the user to designate administrator authority of the Approval menu.
Attendance administrator can set and manage the Attendance menu in the admin setting page.
Select the user to designate administrator authority of the Approval menu.
Select the designation to be displayed on the Groupware organization chart and the sorting method.
Position means employee, deputy, deputy manager, department head etc., and Job title means part leader, department leader, business leader, etc.
If [Job title] is checked, but there is no job title, the position is displayed.

Select Main Portal: Select the first screen to be displayed after logging in. (When setting the main portal, it applies to all users of the groupware, and currently, users cannot set a separate screen.)
User Format : Select how to display users.
Select Editor : Select an editor to use when writing or reading mails and posts within the Groupware.

Editor content size : After setting the Daum editor in “Select Editor”, select the body size when writing or reading mails or posts within the Groupware. (If the CK editor is set, only mail reading is applied.)
For Chrome users, it is recommended to use Namo Editor.
It is difficult to use normally in IE 8 and 10.
IE 8: html5 not supported, security reasons, etc.
IE 10 : It is recommended to use after updating to IE 11
Company Logo : Company logo to be displayed in the upper left corner of the Login screen. (If you click the image, you can upload files through your PC.)
Select screen type: Choose between horizontal and vertical login screens.
Main image : Main banner image to be displayed in the middle of the Login screen. (You can select the registered image, and if you check [Direct Select], you can upload the file through your PC.)
Header : Header to be displayed at the top of the login screen.
Footer : Footer to be displayed at the bottom of the login screen.
You can set the Mobile Groupware app login screen. (If you click the image, you can upload files through your PC.)
We recommend using the Chrome browser.
The set content size can only be checked within the Groupware.
Click the image to upload the file.

※ 데이터 삭제 없이 용량 추가를 원하시면

고객센터를 통하여 데이터 용량 상품을 추가로 구매해 주시기 바랍니다.
Enter the phone number in the personal Information.
There is no data to delete.

{0}이 영구 삭제되며, 삭제된 용량은 익일 반영됩니다.
또한 삭제된 파일은 복구할 수 없습니다. 정말 삭제하시겠습니까?
You can specify the allocated capacity of each Groupware menu and check the remaining capacity.
1 Attached File Capacity: The maximum size when 1 file is attached to the 1 post/mail/document etc.
Total Attached File Capacity: The total capacity of files attached to the 1 post/mail/document etc.
Allocated Capacity: Allocated capacity for each Groupware menu. The sum of allocated capacity for each menu cannot exceed the capacity of the entire office.
You can directly enter the number in the box and specify the allocated capacity by clicking the [Save] button.
Delete Data: If the allocated capacity is insufficient, you can secure the capacity by deleting the user's data that has already been deleted.
Click the [Delete Data] button to proceed with the deletion, and the deleted capacity will be reflected the next day.
Recover Account: Deleted user accounts can be recovered to their original state.
Delete Account: Deleted accounts are deleted forever, and only accounts for which [Delete Data] has been processed can be deleted forever.
Menu to manage the organization chart by registering the company's department and department members.
In this menu, departments and members are arranged in the order specified by the administrator.
The order of departments or users can be changed by selecting them with the mouse and dragging them to the specific location.
※ Can move departments and department members with the mouse even in the inquiry state.
※ Only users registered as Company Administrator can change the organization chart, and request the Company Administrator for the authority.
The administrator information is a list of company administrators registered in the ‘Authority Setting’ tab.
Red department name icon  : Virtual department
15,000 wonper 1,000 cases / 1 month (VAT not included) [In case of additional use, provided in units of 1,000]
6,000 wonper recipient number + 39won/1 sending / 1 month (VAT not included)
Can check the service name and service access information of your company.

This indicates the number of license accounts in use and the total number of license accounts for the U+ Groupware service in use by your company, and monthly billing is calculated based on the number of license accounts.
Can create as many user IDs as the number of licensed accounts.
Service fee: KRW 15,000 per 1,000 cases/ 1 month
※ In case of additional use, provided in units of 1,000 cases.
Designate the administrator of the board.
You can designate the board administrator to multiple users.
You can search the SMS and MMS usage of employees.
This is a service that allows you to search the use statistics of the Groupware Menus by department and user.
Approval : You can check the number of completed internal approval, received Internal approvals, and average processing time by department / user.
Calendar : You can check the number of registrations by department / user.
Main notice : You can check the number of registrations by department / user.
Address : You can check the number of addresses by department / user.
WebDisk : You can check the number of registered files and capacity(byte) of each file by department / user.
Business : You can check the number of registrations for business type by department / user..
You cannot save more than the number of licenses.
Failed to send the invitation mail.
It can only be executed by the company administrators.
There is an ID that has already been processed. Please try again.
The ID is duplicated in the organization chart. Failed to approve.
You can add positions within the company, and modify and delete existing positions.

The rank of position is in the order of top > bottom in the position list, After clicking on the position you want, you can change the rank of the position by dragging & dropping it to the specific location.
You can add job titles within the company, and modify and delete existing jot titles.

The rank of job title is in the order of top > bottom in the position list, After clicking on the position you want, you can change the rank of the job title by dragging & dropping it to the specific location.
Do not open any more today
Checking 'Allow Korea IPs' grants access from Korea IP ranges by default.
[U+ Works] Approval request mail for the user
Failed to register drive push notifiacation.
[U+Works]This is the approval number for Phonenumber settings.The requested approval number is [{0}].
Authentication number you entered is not correct.

Authentication information is incorrect.
Please proceed with authentication again.
